basic_details.job_title: NIT Agartala Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: National Institute Of Technology Agartala (NIT Agartala) has officially released the Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 notification (Advt. No. F.NITA.42 (34-Bioengg)/2023/NER/Part I/Manpower) for 1 vacancy at NIT Agartala. Eligible candidates with B.E./B.Tech or M.E./M.Tech in Biotechnology, Food Technology, Food Science and Technology, Industrial Biotechnology or M.Sc. in relevant fields, qualified through CSIR-UGC NET (including Lectureship/Assistant Professorship) or GATE can apply through email. The walk-in interview is scheduled on 10 August 2026. Selected candidates will be appoint

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for specific age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: B.E/B.Tech or M.E/M.Tech in Biotechnology / Food Technology / Food Science and Technology / Industrial Biotechnology or MSc in a relevant field, and selected through National Eligibility Tests - CSIR-UGC NET, including lectureship (Assistant Professorship) and GATE.
qualification.details: Junior Research Fellow: B.E/B.Tech or M.E/M.Tech in Biotechnology / Food Technology / Food Science and Technology / Industrial Biotechnology or MSc in a relevant field. Selected through National Eligibility Tests - CSIR-UGC NET, including lectureship (Assistant Professorship) and GATE.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 37,000/- + HRA for 2 Years, Rs. 42,000/- + HRA for 3rd Year
salary_details.details: Junior Research Fellow: Rs. 37,000/- + HRA for 2 Years Junior Research Fellow: Rs. 42,000/- + HRA for 3rd Year

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Agartala Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 10-08-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Agartala Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 10-08-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Junior Research Fellow position at NIT Agartala?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Junior Research Fellow position at NIT Agartala is 10 August 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a B.E/B.Tech or M.E/M.Tech in Biotechnology, Food Technology, Food Science and Technology, Industrial Biotechnology, or an MSc in a relevant field, and have qualified through CSIR-UGC NET or GATE.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Junior Research Fellow position at NIT Agartala.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow role?
faq.answer: The salary offered is Rs. 37,000/- + HRA for the first two years and Rs. 42,000/- + HRA for the third year.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is via email.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Junior Research Fellow position will be based on an interview.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. Where is NIT Agartala located?
faq.answer: National Institute of Technology Agartala is located in Agartala, Tripura, with the pincode 799046.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is F.NITA.42 (34-Bioengg)/2023/NER/Part I/Manpower.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: This is a project-based job type for the Junior Research Fellow position.
